g.text: Length Penalty Effect in Beam Search

text.tspan: The length penalty divides the raw score by a factor
that grows with sequence length. Since scores are
negative, dividing by a larger penalty makes the
This counteracts the natural accumulation of
In beam search, apply length penalty when comparing
Cumulative log probabilities naturally favor SHORTER sequences
Each generated token adds a negative log-probability
Shorter sequences accumulate less negative score
• Constant 5 prevents excessive penalty for length=1
